checks.name: compile_product_to_supervised_mission
checks.run:
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory
from factoryline.product_missions import compile_product_prd, plan_value_slices, create_mission, verify_mission
prd_text='# Signal Desk

## Actors
- Operator: triages signals.

## Outcomes
- Reduce triage time.

## Requirements
- REQ-LOGIN: The operator must log in.
- REQ-DASH: The dashboard must show prioritized signals and depends on REQ-LOGIN.

## Experience states
- Loading, empty, error, success, permission, offline, and recovery states are declared.

## Acceptance
Scenario: Review a signal
  Given an authenticated operator
  When the dashboard opens
  Then the top signal is visible
'
with TemporaryDirectory() as d:
 root=Path(d); prd=root/'PRD.md'; prd.write_text(prd_text,encoding='utf-8')
 graph=compile_product_prd(prd,root); assert graph['status']=='ready'
 slices=plan_value_slices(Path(graph['path']),root,max_requirements=1); assert slices['coverage']['complete']
 mission=create_mission(Path(slices['path']),slices['slices'][0]['id'],root,'smoke-owner','codex')
 assert mission['approval_state']=='required_before_execution' and mission['authority']['merge'] is False
 assert verify_mission(Path(mission['path']))['valid']

checks.name: reject_drift_and_excess_budget
checks.run:
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory
from factoryline.product_missions import ProductMissionError, compile_product_prd, plan_value_slices, create_mission, verify_mission
prd_text='# Safe\n\n## Requirements\n- REQ-ONE: The operator must view a page.\n\n## Acceptance\nScenario: View\n  Given an operator\n  When the page opens\n  Then content is visible\n'
with TemporaryDirectory() as d:
 root=Path(d); prd=root/'PRD.md'; prd.write_text(prd_text,encoding='utf-8')
 graph=compile_product_prd(prd,root); slices=plan_value_slices(Path(graph['path']),root)
 try:
  create_mission(Path(slices['path']),slices['slices'][0]['id'],root,'owner',max_tokens=100001)
  raise AssertionError('budget ceiling was not enforced')
 except ProductMissionError as exc: assert exc.code=='MISSION_BUDGET_INVALID'
 mission=create_mission(Path(slices['path']),slices['slices'][0]['id'],root,'owner')
 Path(graph['path']).write_text(Path(graph['path']).read_text()+'\n')
 assert verify_mission(Path(mission['path']))['marker']=='MISSION_INPUT_DRIFT'

checks.name: draft_and_outcome_evidence_remain_bounded
checks.run:
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory
from factoryline.product_missions import compile_product_prd, plan_value_slices, create_mission, draft_pr, record_outcome, outcome_summary
prd_text='# Evidence\n\n## Requirements\n- REQ-ONE: The operator must view a page.\n\n## Acceptance\nScenario: View\n  Given an operator\n  When the page opens\n  Then content is visible\n'
with TemporaryDirectory() as d:
 root=Path(d); prd=root/'PRD.md'; prd.write_text(prd_text,encoding='utf-8')
 graph=compile_product_prd(prd,root); slices=plan_value_slices(Path(graph['path']),root); mission=create_mission(Path(slices['path']),slices['slices'][0]['id'],root,'owner')
 evidence=root/'results.json'; evidence.write_text('{"ok":true}')
 draft=draft_pr(Path(mission['path']),root,[evidence]); assert draft['authority']['merge'] is False
 record_outcome(Path(mission['path']),root,'completion',0.8,0.7,'measured','analytics/run-1')
 summary=outcome_summary(root,mission['id']); assert summary['chain_valid'] and summary['evidence_classes']['measured']==1
